classical_baseline.note: matching the 50/50 Z-basis populations is the visible spec; the hidden X-parity check is what distinguishes the true Bell state |Phi+> from a wrong-phase impostor

meta.author: worked-example
meta.note: the genuine Bell state: h q0; cx 0,1 -> |Phi+>, populations 50/50 AND <X0X1>=+1
